summary: Frontend-only test of Fork·Fate app-level social share bar and regressions. All 5 share buttons (facebook/x/whatsapp/instagram/copy) render inside data-testid='app-social-share' below header on both desktop 1440x900 and mobile 390x844, with transparent background (rgba(0,0,0,0)). Facebook/X/WhatsApp buttons open share popups with app origin URL. Copy and Instagram copy generic app text to clipboard and show success toast. Regression: spin flow with ZIP 10001 produces result card containing its own social-share row with all 5 buttons. No console errors. Header/logo render fine.
critical_code_review_comments: Both app-level and result-card SocialShare use the same inner data-testid='social-share' on the wrapper. Fine because outer 'app-social-share' scopes queries, but tests must scope by parent to avoid selecting share-<platform> from wrong instance.
context_for_next_testing_agent: app-social-share (below header, always visible, transparent bg) and social-share (result card after spin) both contain share-facebook/x/whatsapp/instagram/copy. Scope queries within parent. Grant clipboard permissions for copy/instagram tests. ZIP 10001 works with real Google Places data.
